title: TravelSpend
description: Lifetime and per-trip travel-spend statistics with cost-per-trip and cost-per-day, plus optional carbon estimates (FR-TRV-002). Provided by Module 11 (Travel) to Rewards (status), Bills (trip bills), and Workspace. MONEY: all *_cents fields are integer minor units (CAD); foreign-sourced spend is FX-converted to CAD (arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent) before aggregation. Carbon estimates are NOT money and carry a coarse confidence flag rather than implying precision.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; cross-profile reads authZ-checked server-side.

lifetime_spend_cad_cents.description: Sum of all trips' CAD spend, integer cents. Computed by summing already-rounded per-trip CAD cents (associative, exact).

avg_cost_per_trip_cad_cents.description: lifetime_spend / trip_count, integer cents, half-up at the final cent. Omitted/0 when trip_count = 0 (consumers show Empty state, never $0.00).

spend_cad_cents.description: Total CAD spend for this trip, integer cents.

duration_days.description: Trip length in days; null when dates are unknown.

cost_per_day_cad_cents.description: spend / duration_days, integer cents, half-up at the final cent. Null/omitted when duration_days is null or 0 — never divide by an unknown duration.

cost_source.description: Provenance of the spend figure: parsed itinerary costs, spine TransactionStream matches, or a blend. Drives confidence shown to the user.

carbon.description: Optional carbon estimate (FR-TRV-002). NOT money; an estimate with an explicit coarse-confidence flag — never presented as exact.

kg_co2e.description: Estimated kg CO2e, decimal string. Estimate only.

confidence.description: Coarse confidence; carbon is never presented as precise.

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial transaction/itinerary picture; consumers mark stats incomplete.

freshness.description: Freshness of the FX rates and transaction matches the spend figures were derived from. Stale FX (money input) ⇒ consumers flag the affected CAD figures.
